How it works

  1. 1 Choose any available ticket.
  2. 2 Enter your details.
  3. 3 The ticket is held for 10 minutes.
  4. 4 Complete payment securely with Square.
  5. 5 Your ticket is locked in once payment is confirmed.

Important

  • $50 ticket + online booking fee
  • Payment is processed by Square
  • Held tickets expire after 10 minutes
  • All sales are final unless otherwise determined by the committee
